name: Zucchini Chocolate Cake 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first 7 ingredients and set aside.
2. Beat together the eggs, sugar, and oil in a large bowl.
3. Add the buttermilk, zucchini, vanilla, and orange peel to the egg mixture. Mix until well combined.
4. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture and chopped nuts to the wet ingredients. Stir until just combined.
5. Grease a 9-inch x 13-inch pan with butter or cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely before frosting with cream cheese frosting.
